flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Lindenwood University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($18.6k → $21.6k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Lindenwood University fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (77.7% → 65.6%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Lindenwood University rose 10% between 2006 and 2009 ($12.0k → $13.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Lindenwood University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7% → 0.0%).
